Class Performance

java.lang.Object
model.Performance
public class Performance extends Object
Represents a single scheduled performance of an Event in the university events app.

A performance has a specific date/time window, a venue, a ticket price, and a limited number of tickets. Students book individual performances rather than events directly.

  • Field Details

    • DATE_TIME_FORMATTER

      public static final DateTimeFormatter DATE_TIME_FORMATTER

  • Constructor Details

    • Performance

      public Performance(long performanceID, Event event, LocalDateTime startDateTime, LocalDateTime endDateTime, Collection<String> performerNames, String venueAddress, int venueCapacity, boolean venueIsOutdoors, boolean venueAllowsSmoking, int numTickets, double ticketPrice)
      Constructs a new Performance.
      Parameters:
      performanceID - the unique performance ID
      event - the parent event; must not be null
      startDateTime - the start date/time; must not be null
      endDateTime - the end date/time; must not be null and must be after start
      performerNames - names of the performers
      venueAddress - the venue address; must not be null or blank
      venueCapacity - the capacity of the venue; must be non-negative
      venueIsOutdoors - whether the venue is outdoors
      venueAllowsSmoking - whether the venue allows smoking
      numTickets - total tickets available; must be non-negative
      ticketPrice - price per ticket in GBP; must be non-negative

    • checkCreatedByEP

      public boolean checkCreatedByEP(String epEmail)
      Checks whether the given EP email matches the organiser of this performance's event.

      Used to verify that the EP attempting to cancel a performance is the one who created it.

      Parameters:
      epEmail - the email to check
      Returns:
      true if the email matches the organiser's email

    • cancel

      public void cancel()

    • hasActiveBookings

      public boolean hasActiveBookings()

    • getBookingDetailsForRefund

      public String getBookingDetailsForRefund()
      Returns a formatted string containing the booking details needed for processing refunds during performance cancellation.
      Returns:
      a string with refund-relevant booking info

    • getBookings

      public List<Booking> getBookings()
      Returns an unmodifiable view of the bookings for this performance.
      Returns:
      an unmodifiable list of bookings

    • addBooking

      public void addBooking(Booking booking)

    • getActiveBookings

      public List<Booking> getActiveBookings()
      Returns all active bookings for this performance.
      Returns:
      a list of bookings with status BookingStatus.ACTIVE
